title: bellis annua subsp. microcephala
intro: Bellis annua subsp. microcephala is a subspecies of the annual dandelion plant, which is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bellis annua subsp. microcephala include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve liver function, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various diseases, such as cancer and diabetes. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
